submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.tagline: Open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that hands back reviewable, tested work.
submitted_payload.description: Ralph Workflow is a free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for developers doing ambitious software work. It keeps a simple core, then composes planning, implementation, and verification into a repo-native workflow so longer coding runs end in tested, reviewable output instead of another confident summary. You can use the default workflow as-is today or build your own on top.
submitted_payload.tags: open-source, AI dev tools, agent orchestration, claude code, codex
submitted_payload.replaces: ad hoc prompt chains, chat-only coding workflows

why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is still flat, so a fresh high-fit backlink lane beats more owned-content churn.
IndieStack is explicitly aimed at developer tools surfaced to AI coding agents, which matches Ralph Workflow's audience better than generic AI directories.
This target was not already present in outreach-log.md, so it expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The public submission form was executable from this runtime and allowed a Codeberg-primary URL.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers and AI-coding-agent users discover Ralph Workflow through a developer-tool directory that points them to the Codeberg primary repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live IndieStack listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat IndieStack as pending only and shift the next fresh-action slot to another untouched developer-tool directory with an executable public submit path.
